name: Chamfer
summary: The Chamfer class defines how the corners of a polybeam or a contour plate are rounded.

constructors.name: Chamfer()
constructors.summary: Creates a chamfer instance with the basic shape type CHAMFER_NONE.

constructors.name: Chamfer(Double, Double, Chamfer.ChamferTypeEnum)
constructors.signature: public Chamfer(double X, double Y, Chamfer.ChamferTypeEnum Type)
constructors.summary: Instantiates a chamfer with the given values.

params.name: X
params.doc: The X value of the chamfer.

params.name: Y
params.doc: The Y value of the chamfer.

params.name: Type
params.doc: The basic shape type of the chamfer.

properties.name: DZ1
properties.summary: The thickness above the offset. Note that this does nothing when used with the PolyBeam.

properties.name: DZ2
properties.summary: The thickness below the offset. Note that this does nothing when used with the PolyBeam.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: The basic shape type of the chamfer.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: The second dimension of straight chamfers.
